# SurfZone DEM 2019 (Environment Agency, England, 2 m) — OGL v3.0. 1301 OS 5km
# tiles, fetched as per-tile ZIPs from the Defra survey tile API over public HTTPS (the
# ?subscription-key=dspui below is a public client-side key, no login). Generated by
# harvest.py — re-run it if the key rotates or the EA ships a new vintage.
